source: Agnico Eagle NI 43-101 Technical Report, LaRonde Complex (effective Dec 31, 2022; dated Mar 24, 2023): https://s205.q4cdn.com/243646470/files/doc_downloads/LarondeComplex/LaRonde_43-101_Tech_Rep_March_24_2023_SEDAR_FINAL.pdf

assets.name: LaRonde Mine (complex component)
assets.notes: Production values use recovered gold ounces from the 2023 LOM production table for 2023-2027, converted to koz. CAPEX values are taken from the LaRonde subtotal in C$M for 2023-2027 and converted at C$1.30/US$1.00. AISC is currently a placeholder pending mine-level AISC extraction from Agnico disclosures.

CAPEX values are taken from the LZ5 subtotal in C$M for 2023-2027 and converted at C$1.30/US$1.00. AISC is currently a placeholder pending mine-level AISC extraction from Agnico disclosures.
